heading: Emergency mortgage relief payments
label: 2705 Emergency mortgage relief payments
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was repealed by , , .Section 2712 of this titlePub. L. 111–203, title XIV, § 1496(b)(7)124 Stat. 2209July 21, 2010
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was repealed by , , .Section 2712 of this titlePub. L. 111–203, title XIV, § 1496(b)(7)124 Stat. 2209July 21, 2010

children.heading: Direct payments to mortgagee
children.label: a Direct payments to mortgagee
children.text: In the case of any mortgagee which would otherwise be eligible to participate in the program authorized under but does not qualify for an advance or advances as authorized by section 2712 of this title or under section 1430, 1430b, or 1431 of this title or otherwise elects not to participate in the program authorized under , the Secretary is authorized to make repayable emergency mortgage relief payments directly to such mortgagee on behalf of homeowners whose mortgages are held by such financial institution and who are delinquent in their mortgage payments.section 2704 of this title1section 2704 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Mortgages eligible; terms and conditions
children.label: b Mortgages eligible; terms and conditions
children.text: Emergency mortgage relief payments shall be made under this section only with respect to a mortgage which meets the requirements of and only on such terms and conditions as the Secretary may prescribe, subject to the provisions of .section 2702 of this titlesection 2703 of this title

children.heading: Processing of relief payments; power of Secretary
children.label: c Processing of relief payments; power of Secretary
children.text: The Secretary may make such delegations and accept such certifications with respect to the processing of mortgage relief payments provided under this section as he deems appropriate to facilitate the prompt and efficient implementation of the assistance authorized under this section.
